title: Looking for a developer to create custom recipe

posts.author: willder (Will)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m looking for a specialist/developer that can create a custom recipe to do the following:

Populate the world clock column with the value of a location field

Please can someone assist and send me a quote on the cost to create.

posts.author: rob (Roberto Tremonti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @willder
You can do that with General Caster app.
https://generalcaster.app

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml: This can also be done with Integromat by using the Google Maps API inside Integromat.

posts.author: nicole165 (Nicole)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Hope you are doing well

I can assist you with a developer.

Please reach me via Email : nicole(at)cisinlabs(dot)com.

Looking forward to hear back.

Best,
Nicole
